title: Brain Leech
description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]"SHARE KNOWLEDGE???"[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

notes: The 5 random card options in Share Knowledge are generated from your character's card pool. The 5 HP damage from Rip the Leech Off is [gold]unblockable[/gold] and [gold]unpowered[/gold] — it cannot be reduced by block or powers. If defeated by this event, the death message reads: "[character] was consumed by the [gold]Brain Leech[/gold]."
